position_id.Description: Identifier of a single stimulation position (one row). Referenced from position_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

position_description.Description: Free-text description of the position / role in the protocol.

position_x.Description: x coordinate of the stimulation site in the coordinate system declared in *_coordsystem.json.

position_y.Description: y coordinate of the stimulation site.

position_z.Description: z coordinate of the stimulation site.
